facebook.content:
You know what they say: "behind every successful person, there's a person behind them." But what if I told you that's not entirely true? You are not beholden to someone else's opinion or support to achieve your purpose. Your worth and value come from being a child of the Most High God.

The scripture says, "I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me." - Philippians 4:13

You don't need someone's permission to be successful.
facebook.fullPost:
You know what they say: "behind every successful person, there's a person behind them." But what if I told you that's not entirely true? You are not beholden to someone else's opinion or support to achieve your purpose. Your worth and value come from being a child of the Most High God.

The scripture says, "I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me." - Philippians 4:13

You don't need someone's permission to be successful.

Watch the full teaching
https://increasingfaith.net/teachings.html

#IFM #IncreasingFaith #BibleTeaching
facebook.pullQuote: You are not beholden to someone else's opinion or support to achieve your purpose.

instagram.content: You were created to bear fruit, but fruit doesn't grow in a sterile environment. To bear fruit in your life and marriage, you must first create a fertile soil for God's presence to rest. Psalms 132:13 - "For the Lord hath chosen Zion; he hath desired it for his habitation."
